SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAILING TO KLOTZ WATCHES AND CLOCKS RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY EDGERTON, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT KLOTZ, ROLF  KLOTZ WATCHES AND CLOCKS SALES & SERV ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
